description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle of Complete Hemp Rash, Itch & Burn Relief Ointment CBD, featuring a tall, slender form with a smooth, glossy surface. The bottle is predominantly wrapped in a deep purple label with white text, providing product information and branding. The cap is a solid, opaque gray color and appears to be made of plastic, fitting snugly over the dispensing mechanism. The label includes detailed usage instructions, ingredients, and a QR code, with the main branding and product name prominently displayed on the front. The overall design is modern and clinical, with geometric patterns subtly integrated into the label background. The bottle is likely lightweight and portable, suitable for personal use in urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical bottle of Complete Hemp CBD ointment with a purple label, white text, and a gray plastic cap. The design is sleek and modern, featuring detailed product information and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Complete Hemp branding, product name, and main label details in white on a purple background.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the detailed directions, ingredients, and usage instructions in small white text on the purple label.
description_view_2: Side-rear view highlighting the QR code, additional product information, and a continuation of the label's geometric pattern.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the front and back label, with visible branding and part of the cap.
attribute_product_name: RASH, ITCH & BURN RELIEF OINTMENT CBD
